items.summary: Expand the FaultMatrixPanel component to display complete Party A and Party B fault percentage breakdowns for all scenarios defined in faultMatrix.ts, including contributing factors and rationale text for each scenario entry.

Expand the scenario coverage in faultMatrix.ts to include all common road incident scenario types already referenced in scenarioReferences.ts (rear-end, red light, lane change, and any remaining unmapped types), ensuring each has fault percentages, contributing factors, rationale, and related violation types.

Update FaultReferenceDisplay on the FaultReferencePage to show the full fault percentage breakdown (Party A and Party B with labelled bars) alongside legal references when a scenario is selected, consistent with the expanded faultMatrix.ts data.
